title: Ezneat Loofah Shower Puff 3Pcs 70 Gram Ultra Soft Mesh Bath Sponges for Adults Exfoliating, Scrubbing and Cleaning - Body Scrubbers for Use in Shower -Black
features: Premium Quality: Ezneat patented design shower sponge is soft, gentle, and skin-friendly with the feature of natural bamboo charcoal for durability, lasting elasticity, and beautifully tied netting for thorough and decent clean up
Multiple Uses: Gently rub this bath sponges for adults on your skin to cleanse. Keep your skin healthy by regularly using sponges bath to remove dead skin, blackheads, excessive oil, grease, or dirt

Ultimate Shower Experience: With shower scrubber retainable firm shape, rich lather, their easy to hold and soft grip, you can easily reach and clean your whole body for a thorough scrub and massaging affect. Ezneat bath sponges multipack is a must for ultimate shower experience
Bath Décor: Our puffy sized, loop-shaped skin care exfoliating spongewith its attractive and elegant color gives a luxurious touch to your bathroom décor
Reusable: Wash the shower scrunchie with water after every use for future bathing. Ezneat cord hanging design enables our loofah sponge to get dry by hanging it from the additional long-ribbon
description: Product Description Feel the Spa at Home - Ultra Soft, Yet Powerfully Exfoliating – Gently buffs away dead skin cells without irritation. Deep exfoliation without irritation Gentle Exfoliation – This versatile body scrubber doubles as a body scrub exfoliator or exfoliating sponge, leaving your skin feeling soft and refreshed. Ideal for bath sponges for adults or as part of your bath accessories. Creates rich lather with less soap Luxurious Bubbles – Designed to provide a rich lather, these bath sponges and shower sponges enhance your bathing routine, whether you use them as a loofah sponge, or body sponge. These multipurpose sponges can also serve as a loofah back scrubber, shower scrubber, or bathroom sponge, adding convenience to your bath accessories. Soft mesh for sensitive skin Stylish and Sustainable Shower Puff – Made from dense layers of fully recycled mesh material, this luxurious puff works as an african net sponge, loofah, or shower puff, creating a rich foam lather for your bath. Dries quickly to prevent bacteria buildup Premium-quality mesh material BPA-free, safe for all skin types Built to last with reinforced string/loop Quick-dry material to avoid mildew High-Density Mesh Crafted from premium-quality polyethylene (PE) material, offering a soft yet durable texture that’s gentle on skin and long-lasting even with daily use. Weight per Unit 70g (±2g) – Each loofah weighs approximately 70 grams, offering more mesh content compared to standard loofahs, making it extra fluffy and better at lathering soap or body wash. Size (Expanded Diameter) Approximately 6.1 inches (15.5 cm) – Generously sized to fit comfortably in hand and cover more surface area during scrubbing. Color Matte Black with Brand Tag – Sleek and modern look designed especially for men, adds a bold and stylish touch to your shower essentials. Mesh Strip Dimensions Length: ~60 inches (150 cm), Width: ~4 inches (10 cm) – Unfolded mesh length and width before assembly, indicating the volume and richness of each loofah puff. Package Contents 3 Loofahs per Pack – Cost-effective and convenient set for long-term use or sharing among family members. Exfoliation Level High – Designed to effectively exfoliate dead skin cells while being gentle enough for daily use Usage Type Body Scrubbing, Lathering & Cleansing – Ideal for men & Women, Girls, Kids seeking an invigorating shower experience with rich foam and effective cleansing. Skin Compatibility All Skin Types – Safe for use on sensitive, dry, oily, and combination skin. Hanging Loop Durable Nylon Strap – Comes with a strong, securely stitched strap for easy hanging and faster drying after use Construction Method Hand-Tied Mesh Layers – Crafted by hand Double Knot with tightly layered mesh to prevent unraveling and ensure product longevity. Eco-Friendliness Reusable & Recyclable Material – Contributes to reducing single-use plastic in personal care products. Water Absorption Fast Lathering, Quick Drying – Absorbs and holds lather efficiently while drying quickly after rinsing. Care Instructions Rinse Thoroughly, Hang Dry After Use – Recommended to replace every 3-4 weeks for hygiene. Double Knot Hand-Tied Mesh Layers – Crafted by hand Double Knot with tightly layered mesh to prevent unraveling and ensure product longevity.
